calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution

Petition For A Court Determination Of The Persons Entitled To Distribution Of The Decedents Estate
Off Calendar Mar-17-2026 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For A Court Determination Of The Persons Entitled To Distribution Of The Decedents Estate
Off Calendar Jan-07-2026 Continued To Mar-17-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Brian Connors for petitioner Andrea Ajoudani (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Court Determination of Persons Entitled to Distribution of Decedent's Estate.

The Court noted that no objections had been filed or received. The Court discussed whether the language of the deed was sufficient to treat the subject property as community property under applicable law. The Court ordered that petitioner file a late election pursuant to Probate Code section 13502, subdivision (b), and related acknowledgments.

The Court continued the matter to March 17, 2026, at 9:00 a.m., to allow time for the required filings.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
